name: Rusty Dagger
description: A corroded goblin dagger, barely holding together. Deals 1d4 piercing damage.

name: Wolf Pelt
description: A rough grey wolf pelt, valuable to tanners and merchants.

name: Cockatrice Feather
description: An iridescent feather from a cockatrice. Sought by alchemists for petrification remedies.

name: Bone Fragment
description: A shard of enchanted bone, faintly humming with residual necromantic energy.

name: Shadow Essence
description: A wisp of condensed shadow trapped in a glass vial. Used in dark alchemy.

name: Spider Silk
description: A bundle of incredibly strong silk harvested from a giant spider's web.

name: Venom Sac
description: A giant spider's venom gland, still dripping with potent toxin. Useful for coating weapons or brewing antidotes.

name: Ghoul Claw
description: A severed ghoul claw coated in paralyzing residue. Herbalists prize it for medicinal extracts.

name: Crude Greataxe
description: A heavy, poorly balanced greataxe of orcish make. Deals 1d10 slashing damage.

name: Mimic Adhesive
description: A jar of incredibly sticky substance scraped from a dead mimic. Has many creative uses.

name: Void Shard
description: A fragment of crystallized void energy from the Eclipsed Beast. Pulses with dark power.

name: Shadow Crystal
description: A dark crystal that absorbs nearby light. Radiates an unsettling chill.
